title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCXCIV. Lullabies.
content:
Hush-a-bye, baby, on the tree top,
        When the wind blows, the cradle will rock,
        When the bough bends, the cradle will fall,
        Down will come baby, bough, cradle, and all.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCXCIV. Lullabies."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
